{"code":"(def prs (github_pull_requests))
(def open-prs (filter #(% :state "open") prs))
(def non-closing-prs (filter #((nil? (:closes_linear %)) (not (some? (:closes_linear %)))) open-prs))
(def additions-prs (filter #((> (:additions %) 400) (not (some? (:additions %)))) non-closing-prs))
(def repo-counts (group-by :repository additions-prs))
(def total-count (count additions-prs))
